footer.description: V-sys uses technology to help humanity, making work and life simpler and more efficient.

hero.title: Your AI Work Partner
hero.subtitle: Let AI help you with everything from data analysis to content creation.
hero.subtitle2: From chat and data analysis to image and video creation, order management, customer insights, and inventory tracking — no complex systems needed, just AI that gets your work done.

demo.greeting: Hello! I'm vAI, your intelligent assistant. How can I help you today?
demo.inputPlaceholderErp: Ask AI anything about your business...

0.user: Show me this week's order status
0.ai: This week you have 42 orders totaling $128,500. That's 8% growth over last week, with online orders accounting for 65%. There are 3 pending returns to process.

1.user: Which items are running low on stock?
1.ai: 5 items are currently below safety stock: A4 copy paper (12 boxes left), toner cartridges (3 left), screen protectors (8 left), etc. I recommend creating a purchase order now — I can auto-generate one for you.

vai.vcoinNote: 5 free queries per day. AI features are billed per use with vCoin.

vcoinModal.title: vCoin
vcoinModal.whatIsDesc: vCoin is V-sys's AI usage token. You get 5 free queries per day. Beyond that, AI features consume vCoin.
vcoinModal.dailyFreeTip: 5 free queries per day (chat & image generation), resets daily. Video and document generation are not included.

intro.title: Welcome to vAI
intro.desc: vAI is V-sys's core AI assistant, helping you with data analysis, document processing, smart conversations, and work automation. Log in to get started.

features.title: Supercharge Your Work with AI
features.subtitle: vAI integrates multiple AI capabilities to make your work smarter and faster.

1.title: Smart Conversations
1.desc: Natural language chat for quick answers and suggestions.

2.title: Data Analysis
2.desc: Analyze business data and generate reports and insights.

3.title: Document Processing
3.desc: Automatically organize, classify, and summarize documents.

4.title: Work Automation
4.desc: Automate daily operations and boost productivity.

integration.title: Deep Integration with vWork — Real-Time Data Access
integration.subtitle: vAI is more than a chatbot. It connects directly to your vWork business data, enabling AI to truly understand your operations and help you make better decisions.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.desc: Query order status in real time, auto-generate reports, and analyze sales trends and anomalies.

crm.title: Customer CRM
crm.desc: Analyze customer spending behavior, auto-segment audiences, and recommend follow-up strategies.

inventory.title: Inventory Tracking
inventory.desc: Low stock alerts, purchase-sales-inventory analysis, and smart restocking suggestions.

analytics.title: Smart Reports
analytics.desc: Generate sales reports, financial analysis, and performance comparisons using natural language.

pos.title: POS & Payments
pos.desc: Real-time transaction sync, daily settlement analysis, and anomalous transaction alerts.

service.title: Service Appointments
service.desc: Appointment management, staff scheduling suggestions, and service efficiency analysis.

workflow.title: One Sentence Replaces Hours of Work
workflow.subtitle: vAI works directly with your business data — from queries to report generation, fully automated.

s1.ask: "How does this month's performance compare to last month?"
s1.answer: vAI automatically reads your order data, calculates month-over-month growth, analyzes channel contributions, and generates visual charts.

s2.ask: "Which items are running low? Create a purchase order"
s2.answer: vAI scans for items below safety stock, lists them out, and can directly generate a purchase order for you.

s3.ask: "Generate a customer analysis report for this quarter"
s3.answer: vAI reads CRM data, analyzes purchase frequency, average order value, and churn risk, then auto-generates a PPT or PDF report.

s4.answer: vAI analyzes all POS transactions for the day, flags unusual refund patterns, large discounts, and other suspicious activities to protect your revenue.

tools.title: Beyond Chat — Create Content Too
tools.subtitle: vAI integrates four powerful AI tools, from smart conversations to content creation, boosting your productivity across the board.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.desc: Smart Q&A, data queries, work suggestions — real-time analysis of your business data.

sketch.title: AI Images
sketch.desc: Product image generation, marketing material design, sketch-to-illustration conversion.

video.title: AI Video
video.desc: Product promo videos, storyboard editing, one-click professional short video creation.

docs.title: AI Documents
docs.desc: Auto-generate professional Word, Excel, PPT, and PDF documents.

common.dropzoneText: Click or drag an image here

chat.title: vAI Chat
chat.llmConfigured: LLM Endpoint is configured by the system administrator
chat.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation and all messages? This cannot be undone.
chat.startChat: Start a conversation with AI assistant
chat.llmNotConfigured: LLM Endpoint not configured, please contact your administrator
chat.analyzeAttachments: Please read and analyze the attachment content
chat.aiNoResponse: AI did not return any content
chat.docGenerated: Your {label} document has been generated, click the card below to download.
chat.videoGenerating: Generating video for you, please wait...
chat.videoGenerated: Video has been generated, please check the player below.
chat.aiResponseFailed: AI response failed, please try again later
chat.sendFailed: Send failed, please try again later
chat.llmParseFailed: Unable to parse LLM response, please check API configuration
chat.deleteMessageConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
chat.voiceInputNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser
chat.browserNoVideoSupport: Your browser does not support video playback.
chat.videoCardHint: Want longer, more detailed videos? Go to vAi Video Tool

sketch.title: vAI Sketch
sketch.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate... (e.g. Convert sketch to beautiful illustration)
sketch.generationFailedRetry: Generation failed, please try again later
sketch.noAiResult: AI did not return image result
sketch.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this sketch?
sketch.deleteConfirmPermanent: Are you sure you want to delete this sketch? This cannot be undone.
sketch.canvasEmpty: Canvas is empty, nothing to save
sketch.saveFailedRetry: Save failed, please try again later
sketch.unsavedNew: Current sketch is unsaved, are you sure you want to create a new one?
sketch.noChatGenerationsHint: Images generated in vAi Chat will appear here
sketch.deleteGenerationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this generation record?

video.emptyDesc: Add a video project, add shots, and use AI to generate video segments
video.promptPlaceholder: Describe this shot, e.g.: A cat stretching in the sunlight, camera slowly zooming in...
video.dropzoneText: Click or drag an image here
video.extendPromptTitle: Enter a prompt for the extended segment
video.extendPromptBody:
Enter a description for the extended video (Prompt):

Extending will add approximately 7 seconds to the current video
video.selectProject: Select or create a video project
video.noChatVideosHint: Videos generated in vAi Chat will appear here
video.deleteProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this video project? This cannot be undone.
video.deleteChatVideoConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat video record? (Chat history will show "Related record deleted")
video.noShotsInProject: No shots yet, please add a shot to start
video.selectProjectFirst: Please create or select a project first
video.deleteShotConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete shot {num}?
video.shotDoneNoVideo: Shot {num} generated, but could not extract video
video.safetyFiltered: Video was filtered by safety policy. Please modify your prompt and try again.
video.cannotExtend: This shot has no generated video, cannot extend
video.cannotReadForExtend: Cannot read source video for extending
video.minShotsToCombine: At least 2 completed shots are required to combine
video.combineReady: Combine preview ready, {count} shots will play in sequence
video.noVideoToDownload: This shot has no video to download
video.prevShotHint: Auto-captured last frame from previous shot as reference
video.captureFrameFailed: Failed to capture frame from previous shot
video.prevShotPromptHint: [Continuing from previous shot's last frame — maintain character and scene continuity]
video.chatWelcomeDesc: Tell me what video you want to make, and I'll automatically plan the shots and story for you. For example:
video.chatPlaceholder: Describe the video you want to make, AI will plan the storyboard...
video.chatSuggest2: Create a short social media video introducing our new service
video.chatSuggest3: Make a polished brand image promotional video
video.editStoryboardHint: Edit and click "Save" to apply changes. You can modify each shot's description and duration fields. Narration can be embedded directly in the description (e.g., Narration: xxx).
video.noStoryboardYet: Please describe your video idea first
video.extendFailed: Video extend failed, this shot was not generated
video.generationSlow: AI generation is taking longer than usual, please wait...
video.noDescriptionYet: Please describe your video idea first
video.deleteProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this video?
video.featureGateDesc:
This feature requires {plan} plan or above.
Please upgrade your subscription to use AI video generation.

docs.emptyDesc: Enter a description and let AI generate Word, Excel, PowerPoint, or PDF documents for you
docs.selectDocHint: Select a document from the list on the left, or create a new one
docs.title: Title (optional)
docs.promptPlaceholder:
Describe the document you want to generate...

For example:
- Create a product marketing proposal
- Generate an employee salary details report
- Create a quarterly performance report presentation
docs.generating: AI is generating the document, please wait...
docs.noChatDocsHint: Documents generated in vAi Chat will appear here
docs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?

apps.title: AI Discover
apps.subtitle: Explore 130+ AI application scenarios, start a conversation with one click

vwOrderMgmt.name: Order Management
vwOrderMgmt.desc: AI-assisted vWork order management and queries
vwOrderMgmt.prompt: You are a vWork Order Management AI assistant. Please help me with the following order-related task: [create new order/check order status/batch update orders/handle order exceptions]. Order details: [order information]. Please provide operation suggestions and specific steps.

vwInventory.name: Inventory Assistant
vwInventory.desc: AI-assisted vWork inventory queries and management
vwInventory.prompt: You are a vWork Inventory Management AI assistant. Please help me with the following inventory task: [check stock levels/inventory alert analysis/restock suggestions/stocktake planning]. Product info: [product name or category], warehouse: [warehouse name]. Please provide detailed inventory analysis and recommendations.

vwCustomerMgmt.name: Customer Management
vwCustomerMgmt.prompt: You are a vWork Customer Management AI assistant. Please help me with the following customer task: [add new customer/customer segmentation analysis/follow-up reminders/customer value assessment]. Customer info: [customer details]. Please provide operation suggestions and customer engagement strategies.

vwInvoice.name: Invoice Assistant
vwInvoice.desc: AI-assisted vWork invoice generation and management
vwInvoice.prompt: You are a vWork Invoice Processing AI assistant. Please help me with the following invoice task: [generate invoice/invoice lookup/reconciliation/overdue receivables tracking]. Details: [invoice/order information]. Please provide processing suggestions and templates.

vwReport.name: Report Generator
vwReport.prompt: You are a vWork Report Analysis AI assistant. Please help me generate the following report: [sales report/revenue analysis/customer analysis/inventory report/employee performance]. Time range: [time period], dimensions to include: [dimension description]. Please provide report structure and key data interpretation suggestions.

vwWorkflow.name: Workflow Automation
vwWorkflow.desc: AI-assisted vWork workflow design and automation
vwWorkflow.prompt: You are a vWork Workflow Automation AI assistant. Please help me design the following automated workflow: [auto order assignment/auto restocking/auto customer follow-up/auto notifications]. Business scenario: [scenario description], trigger conditions: [condition description]. Please provide a complete workflow design.

vwSchedule.name: Schedule Manager
vwSchedule.prompt: You are a vWork Schedule Management AI assistant. Please help me arrange the following schedule: [employee shifts/project timeline/delivery schedule/meeting arrangement]. Personnel: [personnel list], time constraints: [constraint conditions], priority: [priority description]. Please provide an optimized scheduling plan.

vwApproval.name: Approval Workflow
vwApproval.prompt: You are a vWork Approval Workflow AI assistant. Please help me design the following approval process: [purchase approval/expense reimbursement/leave approval/contract approval]. Org structure: [structure description], approval rules: [rule description]. Please provide a complete approval workflow design and permission configuration suggestions.

vwNotification.name: Notification Setup
vwNotification.prompt: You are a vWork Notification Setup AI assistant. Please help me configure the following automated notifications: [order status notifications/inventory alerts/payment reminders/task due reminders]. Recipients: [recipient description], channels: [Email/Push/SMS]. Please provide notification templates and trigger condition design.

vwDataImport.name: Data Import/Export
vwDataImport.desc: AI-assisted vWork data import and export
vwDataImport.prompt: You are a vWork Data Import/Export AI assistant. Please help me with the following data task: [import customer data/import product data/export reports/data migration]. Data format: [CSV/Excel/JSON], data fields: [field description]. Please provide data mapping suggestions and important considerations.

article.name: Article Writing
article.prompt: Please help me write an article about [topic], including an introduction, main arguments, and conclusion. Approximately 800-1000 words, professional yet readable tone.

blog.name: Blog Post
blog.prompt: Please help me write a blog post about [topic]. It needs a catchy title, engaging opening, practical insights and advice, and a call-to-action at the end.

adCopy.name: Ad Copy
adCopy.prompt: Please help me write ad copy for [product/service], target audience is [audience description]. Highlight selling points, persuasive tone, include call-to-action. Please provide 3 versions.

productDesc.name: Product Description
productDesc.prompt: Please help me write a product description for [product name]. Product features: [list features]. Highlight product advantages, use cases, professional and appealing tone.

pressRelease.name: Press Release
pressRelease.prompt: Please help me write a press release about [event/product launch], company name is [company name]. Include headline, lead paragraph, body, company background, and contact information.

socialPost.name: Social Media Post
socialPost.desc: Write posts for various social platforms
socialPost.prompt: Please help me write a social media post about [topic] for [platform: Facebook/Instagram/LinkedIn/Twitter]. It should encourage engagement, include appropriate emojis and hashtags. Please provide 3 versions.

seoArticle.name: SEO Article
seoArticle.prompt: Please help me write an SEO-friendly article targeting the keyword [keyword]. Include natural keyword distribution, proper heading structure (H1/H2/H3), meta description, and internal linking suggestions.

story.name: Story Writing
story.prompt: Please help me create a short story about [theme/setting], genre: [realistic/fantasy/sci-fi/mystery], approximately 1000 words. It needs vivid characters, compelling plot, and an unexpected ending.

speech.name: Speech Writing
speech.prompt: Please help me write a speech for [occasion], topic: [topic], duration approximately [X] minutes, tone [formal/casual]. It needs an attention-grabbing opening, clear arguments, and a powerful conclusion.

newsletter.name: Newsletter
newsletter.prompt: Please help me write a newsletter issue, topic: [topic], audience: [audience type]. Include an eye-catching subject line, concise content summary, and clear call-to-action.

bizPlan.name: Business Plan
bizPlan.prompt: Please help me write a business plan outline for [company/project], including executive summary, market analysis, product/service description, marketing strategy, financial projections, and team introduction.

swot.name: SWOT Analysis
swot.prompt: Please help me conduct a SWOT analysis for [company/product/project]. Analyze Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, and Threats in detail, and provide strategic recommendations.

marketAnalysis.name: Market Analysis
marketAnalysis.prompt: Please help me analyze the current state of the [industry/market], including market size, growth trends, key players, consumer behavior, entry barriers, and future outlook.

meetingNotes.name: Meeting Notes
meetingNotes.prompt: Please help me organize meeting notes from the following content: [meeting content]. Include meeting details, attendees, key discussion points, decisions made, and action items.

proposal.name: Proposal
proposal.prompt: Please help me write a proposal for [project/collaboration], client is [client name]. Include background analysis, solution, implementation plan, expected outcomes, and pricing overview.

financialReport.name: Financial Report
financialReport.prompt: Please help me write a financial report summary for [company/project], including revenue overview, cost analysis, profit margins, cash flow status, and financial health assessment.

investPitch.name: Investor Pitch
investPitch.prompt: Please help me prepare investor pitch content for [company name], including problem description, solution, market opportunity, business model, competitive advantages, team introduction, and funding requirements.

competitorAnalysis.name: Competitor Analysis
competitorAnalysis.prompt: Please help me analyze the main competitors of [product/company]. Compare product features, pricing strategies, market positioning, strengths and weaknesses, and market share.

okr.name: OKR Setting
okr.desc: Set team objectives and key results
okr.prompt: Please help me set quarterly OKRs for [department/team], role is [role description]. Include 3-5 Objectives and 3-4 Key Results for each objective.

riskAssessment.name: Risk Assessment
riskAssessment.prompt: Please help me conduct a risk assessment for [project/plan]. Identify potential risks, assess impact levels and probability, and propose risk mitigation strategies and contingency plans.

codeGen.name: Code Generation
codeGen.prompt: Please help me write a [functionality description] program in [programming language]. Requirements: [specific requirements]. Include comments and error handling.

codeReview.name: Code Review
codeReview.prompt:
Please review the following code and identify potential issues, performance bottlenecks, security vulnerabilities, and improvement suggestions:

[paste code]

debugHelper.name: Debug Helper
debugHelper.prompt:
I encountered the following error. Please help me analyze the cause and provide a solution:

Error message: [error message]
Code: [relevant code]
Environment: [development environment]

apiDoc.name: API Documentation
apiDoc.prompt:
Please help me write documentation for the following API endpoint:

Endpoint: [URL]
Method: [GET/POST/PUT/DELETE]
Function: [description]

Include request parameters, response format, error codes, and usage examples.

sqlQuery.name: SQL Query
sqlQuery.prompt: Please help me write a SQL query for [MySQL/PostgreSQL/etc]. Requirements: [query requirements]. Table structure: [describe table structure]. Also provide performance optimization suggestions.

regex.name: Regular Expression
regex.prompt: Please help me write a regular expression for [matching requirement description]. Provide the regex, explain each part's meaning, and give test examples.

architecture.name: System Architecture
architecture.prompt: Please help me design the architecture for [system/application]. Requirements: [requirement description], expected user volume: [user volume]. Include technology stack, system components, data flow, and scaling strategy.

unitTest.name: Unit Testing
unitTest.prompt:
Please help me write unit tests for the following code using [testing framework]. Cover normal cases, edge cases, and error handling:

[paste code]

refactor.name: Code Refactoring
refactor.prompt:
Please help me refactor the following code to improve readability, performance, and maintainability. Explain the reason for each change:

[paste code]

techDoc.name: Technical Documentation
techDoc.prompt: Please help me write technical documentation for [system/feature], including system overview, architecture description, installation guide, API reference, FAQ, and maintenance guide.

studyPlan.name: Study Plan
studyPlan.prompt: Please help me create a study plan for learning [topic/skill]. My current level is [level], goal is [goal], I can invest [hours] hours per week. Please arrange a [weeks]-week study plan.

examPrep.name: Exam Preparation
examPrep.desc: Help with exam review and preparation
examPrep.prompt: Please help me prepare a review plan for [exam name], exam date is [date]. Include key point summaries, common question types, review strategies, and time schedule.

thesisOutline.name: Thesis Outline
thesisOutline.prompt: Please help me create a thesis outline for [research topic], discipline is [discipline]. Include research background, literature review, methodology, expected results, and conclusion.

langLearn.name: Language Learning
langLearn.prompt: I'm learning [language], current level is [beginner/intermediate/advanced]. Please help me practice conversation on the topic of [topic], and correct my mistakes and provide improvement suggestions during the dialogue.

explainer.name: Concept Explainer
explainer.prompt: Please explain [concept/topic] in simple, easy-to-understand terms, as if explaining to a [age/level] person. Use analogies and examples to aid understanding.

readingNotes.name: Reading Notes
readingNotes.prompt: Please help me organize reading notes for "[book title]", including book summary, chapter highlights, key insights, practical advice, and personal reflection questions.

courseDesign.name: Course Design
courseDesign.prompt: Please help me design a course on [topic], target audience is [learner description], duration [hours]. Include course objectives, syllabus, learning activities, assessment methods, and references.

quizGen.name: Quiz Generator
quizGen.prompt: Please generate [number] quiz questions for [topic/chapter], including [multiple choice/fill-in-the-blank/short answer], difficulty level [easy/medium/hard], with answers and explanations.

research.name: Research Assistant
research.prompt: I'm researching [research topic]. Please help me: 1. Organize related research directions 2. Suggest research methods 3. Propose possible hypotheses 4. Suggest data collection approaches.

flashcard.name: Flashcards
flashcard.prompt: Please create 20 flashcards for [topic/subject], each with a front (question/concept) and back (answer/explanation), suitable for [learning purpose].

marketingStrategy.name: Marketing Strategy
marketingStrategy.prompt: Please help me develop a marketing strategy for [product/service], target market is [market description], budget is [budget]. Include goal setting, channel selection, content strategy, and KPI metrics.

brandNaming.name: Brand Naming
brandNaming.prompt: Please help me brainstorm brand names for [product/service description], brand positioning is [positioning description], target audience is [audience]. Provide 10 candidate names with meaning explanations and domain suggestions.

slogan.name: Slogan Creation
slogan.prompt: Please create promotional slogans for [brand name], brand values are [value description], goal is [goal]. Provide 10 slogan options with applicable scenario descriptions.

emailMarketing.name: Email Marketing
emailMarketing.prompt: Please help me write a [purpose: welcome/promotional/re-engagement/event invitation] marketing email for [product], audience is [audience]. Include an attractive subject line, body copy, and call-to-action.

socialStrategy.name: Social Strategy
socialStrategy.prompt: Please help me develop a social media strategy for [brand/product] on [Facebook/Instagram/LinkedIn/TikTok], goal is [goal]. Include content calendar, post types, posting frequency, and engagement strategy.

kolCollab.name: Influencer Collab
kolCollab.prompt: Please help me plan an influencer marketing collaboration for [product/brand], budget is [budget], goal is [goal]. Include influencer selection criteria, collaboration models, content requirements, and performance evaluation methods.

promoPlanning.name: Promotion Planning
promoPlanning.prompt: Please help me plan a promotional campaign for [brand/product], period is [time period], target is [sales target]. Include campaign theme, promotion mechanics, promotional channels, and budget allocation.

persona.name: User Persona
persona.prompt: Please help me build user personas for [product/service]. Include demographics, behavioral traits, pain points and needs, spending habits, and media usage preferences. Create 3 different personas.

abTest.name: A/B Testing
abTest.prompt: Please help me design an A/B test for [website/app/email], testing goal is [conversion rate/click rate/etc]. Include hypothesis, variable settings, sample size calculation, test duration, and analysis method.

adPlacement.name: Ad Placement
adPlacement.prompt: Please help me plan a digital advertising strategy for [product/service], budget is [budget], goal is [goal]. Include platform selection, audience targeting, ad formats, bidding strategy, and expected ROAS.

travelPlan.name: Travel Planning
travelPlan.prompt: Please help me plan a trip to [destination], duration [days], number of travelers [number], budget [budget], preference [type: culture/food/nature/adventure]. Arrange daily itinerary, accommodation, and transportation suggestions.

recipe.name: Recipe Finder
recipe.prompt: I have these ingredients on hand: [list ingredients]. Please recommend 3 dishes I can make, including complete recipes: ingredient list, step-by-step instructions, cooking time, and tips.

fitnessPlan.name: Fitness Plan
fitnessPlan.prompt: Please help me create a fitness plan, goal is [fat loss/muscle gain/maintenance], current weight [weight], can exercise [days] days per week, [duration] each time, available equipment [equipment]. Arrange daily training menu.

financePlanning.name: Financial Planning
financePlanning.prompt: Please help me with personal financial planning, monthly income approximately [amount], goal is [goal: buy a home/retirement/investment]. Suggest budget allocation, savings plan, investment direction, and risk management.

giftIdea.name: Gift Ideas
giftIdea.prompt: Please recommend gifts suitable for [recipient: friend/family/colleague] for [occasion: birthday/holiday/anniversary], budget is [budget], their interests are [interest description]. Please provide 10 suggestions.

partyPlanning.name: Party Planning
partyPlanning.prompt: Please help me plan a [type] party, approximately [number] guests, budget [budget], venue [venue]. Include theme, venue decoration, activity schedule, catering menu, and considerations.

homeDecor.name: Home Decor
homeDecor.prompt: Please help me plan the decoration for [room type], space approximately [square feet/meters], style preference [style], budget [budget]. Suggest color scheme, furniture selection, and decoration tips.

petCare.name: Pet Care
petCare.prompt: I have a [pet type and breed], age [age]. Please provide care advice including diet, exercise, grooming, health check-ups, and common disease prevention.

timeManagement.name: Time Management
timeManagement.prompt: Please help me improve my time management. My main challenge is [challenge description], available time per day is about [hours], tasks to complete: [task list]. Provide specific time management methods and daily schedule suggestions.

habitBuilding.name: Habit Building
habitBuilding.prompt: I want to build the habit of [habit description]. Please help me create a 30-day formation plan, including daily specific actions, progress tracking methods, potential obstacles, and coping strategies.

faqGen.name: FAQ Generator
faqGen.prompt: Please generate a FAQ collection for [product/service], covering product usage, account management, payment methods, return/exchange policies, etc. 5 questions per category with complete answers.

complaintReply.name: Complaint Reply
complaintReply.prompt: Please help me reply to the following customer complaint: [complaint content]. The reply should express apology, explain the reason, propose a solution, with a professional and empathetic tone.

refundProcess.name: Refund Process
refundProcess.prompt: Please help me design a refund handling process and templates for [product/service], including refund conditions, application steps, processing time, reply templates, and exception handling.

productGuide.name: Product Guide
productGuide.prompt: Please help me write a usage guide for [product name], including getting started, basic operations, advanced features, troubleshooting, and FAQ. Friendly and easy-to-understand tone.

serviceFlow.name: Service Flow
serviceFlow.prompt: Please help me design a customer service workflow for [service type], including steps for each stage, script templates, escalation mechanisms, and service quality metrics.

userGuide.name: User Manual
userGuide.prompt: Please help me write a user manual for [system/software], including system introduction, installation setup, feature descriptions, operation steps (with screenshot descriptions), and FAQ.

complaintAnalysis.name: Complaint Analysis
complaintAnalysis.prompt: Please help me build a customer complaint analysis framework, including complaint classification system, severity rating, trend analysis methods, root cause analysis templates, and improvement recommendation report format.

satisfactionSurvey.name: Satisfaction Survey
satisfactionSurvey.prompt: Please help me design a customer satisfaction survey for [product/service], including [NPS/CSAT/CES] metrics, rating questions for various dimensions, open-ended questions, and survey process recommendations.

scriptTemplate.name: Script Template
scriptTemplate.prompt: Please create customer service script templates for [scenario: welcome/inquiry/complaint/follow-up]. Include opening, guided dialogue, solution explanation, and closing. Provide both formal and friendly versions.

knowledgeBase.name: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.prompt: Please help me create a knowledge base article for [product/service], topic is [topic]. Include problem description, solution steps, considerations, and related article links. Format should be easy for support staff to quickly reference.

jobDescription.name: Job Description
jobDescription.prompt: Please help me write a job description for [job title], company is [company description]. Include responsibilities, qualifications, nice-to-haves, compensation and benefits, and company culture introduction.

interviewQ.name: Interview Questions
interviewQ.prompt: Please design interview questions for [job title], including behavioral, technical, situational, and culture-fit questions. 5 questions per category with scoring criteria and ideal answer key points.

offerLetter.name: Offer Letter
offerLetter.prompt: Please help me write an offer letter for [job title], including position details, compensation and benefits, start date, probation terms, and items requiring response. Professional yet warm tone.

performanceReview.name: Performance Review
performanceReview.prompt: Please help me write an employee performance review report template, including work accomplishment review, goal achievement rate, competency assessment, improvement suggestions, and development plan.

employeeHandbook.name: Employee Handbook
employeeHandbook.prompt: Please help me write the [section: attendance policy/leave policy/benefits/code of conduct] section of the company employee handbook. Must comply with [region] labor regulations.

trainingPlan.name: Training Plan
trainingPlan.prompt: Please help me design a [onboarding/skill development/management training] plan for [employee type], duration [days]. Include curriculum outline, training methods, assessment criteria, and follow-up plan.

exitInterview.name: Exit Interview
exitInterview.prompt: Please design an exit interview questionnaire covering departure reasons, job satisfaction, management feedback, company improvement suggestions, etc. About 15-20 questions with guidance notes.

salaryReport.name: Salary Report
salaryReport.prompt: Please help me write a salary survey report template for [position/industry], including market salary levels, compensation structure analysis, benefits comparison, and salary adjustment recommendations.

teamBuilding.name: Team Building
teamBuilding.prompt: Please help me plan a team building activity for [number] people, budget [budget], goal is [improve communication/enhance collaboration/relieve stress]. Provide 5 activity plans including process, required materials, and expected outcomes.

companyCulture.name: Company Culture
companyCulture.prompt: Please help me build a company culture document, company mission is [mission], values are [values]. Include culture manifesto, core value descriptions, code of conduct, and culture practice examples.

logoConcept.name: Logo Concept
logoConcept.prompt: Please brainstorm logo design concepts for [brand name], brand positioning is [positioning], target audience is [audience]. Provide 5 concept directions including design rationale, color suggestions, and style references.

colorScheme.name: Color Scheme
colorScheme.prompt: Please design a color scheme for [brand/project], brand tone is [tone]. Include primary, secondary, and accent color HEX values, and application suggestions for different contexts (web, print, social media).

uiCopy.name: UI Copy
uiCopy.prompt: Please write UI copy for [app/website], page is [page description]. Include headings, button text, tooltip messages, error messages, and empty state copy. Tone: [formal/friendly/playful].

brandStory.name: Brand Story
brandStory.prompt: Please write a brand story for [brand name], founding background is [background], core values are [values]. Needs emotional resonance and authenticity, suitable for the About Us page.

namingIdea.name: Naming Ideas
namingIdea.prompt: Please help me name [product/project/feature], characteristics are [feature description], target users are [users]. Provide 15 name suggestions with meanings and selection rationale.

taglineDesign.name: Tagline Design
taglineDesign.prompt: Please design taglines for [product/campaign], core message is [message], goal is [goal]. Provide 10 taglines in both rational and emotional appeal categories, with applicable contexts.

packagingCopy.name: Packaging Copy
packagingCopy.prompt: Please write packaging copy for [product], including product name presentation, selling point tagline, product description, usage instructions, and brand story snippet. Must match [style] style.

spaceDesc.name: Space Description
spaceDesc.prompt: Please write a space design concept description for [space type: cafe/office/exhibition], style is [style]. Include design philosophy, spatial layout, material selection, and atmosphere creation.

styleGuide.name: Style Guide
styleGuide.prompt: Please build a brand style guide for [brand name], including brand positioning, visual guidelines (colors/fonts/image style), tone of voice guidelines, application examples, and prohibited uses.

creativeBrief.name: Creative Brief
creativeBrief.prompt: Please write a creative brief for [project/campaign], including project background, objectives, target audience, core message, budget, timeline, and success metrics.

contractDraft.name: Contract Draft
contractDraft.prompt: Please draft a basic framework for a [contract type: service/partnership/confidentiality] contract between [Party A] and [Party B]. Include basic terms, rights and obligations, payment conditions, and breach of contract liability. (Note: This is a reference template; please consult legal professionals for formal use.)

privacyPolicy.name: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.prompt: Please write a privacy policy for [website/app], covering data collection, purpose of use, data protection, cookie policy, third-party sharing, and user rights. Must comply with [GDPR/local privacy law] requirements.

termsOfUse.name: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.prompt: Please write terms of use for [platform/service], including service description, usage rules, intellectual property, disclaimers, account management, and dispute resolution.

disclaimer.name: Disclaimer
disclaimer.prompt: Please write a disclaimer for [website/product/service], covering information accuracy, usage risks, third-party links, liability limitations, and governing law.

nda.name: NDA
nda.prompt: Please draft a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) template, type is [unilateral/mutual], confidentiality period is [period]. Include definitions, confidentiality obligations, exclusion clauses, and breach liability.

trademark.name: Trademark Filing
trademark.prompt: Please help me prepare trademark application information for [brand/trademark name], including trademark classification suggestions, application process guide, required document checklist, and considerations.

complianceCheck.name: Compliance Check
complianceCheck.prompt: Please help me check the basic compliance requirements for [business/product] in [region/industry], including necessary licenses and permits, industry regulations, data protection requirements, and filing obligations.

legalOpinion.name: Legal Opinion
legalOpinion.prompt: Please help me analyze the following legal issue: [issue description], involving [legal area]. Provide basic legal analysis, potential risks, and recommended course of action. (Note: This is general reference only; please consult a practicing attorney for formal matters.)

riskDisclosure.name: Risk Disclosure
riskDisclosure.prompt: Please write a risk disclosure statement for [investment/product/service], including main risk types, risk level descriptions, investor/user notices, and risk management recommendations.

authorization.name: Authorization Letter
authorization.prompt: Please write an authorization letter template for [authorization type], grantor is [Party A], grantee is [Party B], scope is [scope]. Include authorization period and restrictions.

dataInterpret.name: Data Interpretation
dataInterpret.prompt: Please help me interpret the following data: [paste data]. Analyze key findings, trends, outliers, and provide actionable business recommendations.

reportDesign.name: Report Design
reportDesign.prompt: Please help me design a data report for [business purpose], metrics to include: [metric list], audience is [report audience]. Suggest report structure, chart types, and data presentation methods.

kpiSetting.name: KPI Setting
kpiSetting.prompt: Please help me set KPI metrics for [department/project], business goal is [goal description]. Include each KPI's definition, calculation method, target value, and measurement frequency.

trendAnalysis.name: Trend Analysis
trendAnalysis.prompt: Please analyze the trends in the following time series data: [data description], time range is [range]. Identify trend direction, seasonal patterns, turning points, and future predictions.

userAnalysis.name: User Analysis
userAnalysis.prompt: Please help me design a user analysis framework for [product/platform]. Include user segmentation methods, key behavioral metrics, funnel analysis, retention analysis, and user lifecycle analysis.

salesAnalysis.name: Sales Analysis
salesAnalysis.prompt: Please analyze the following sales data: [data description]. Include overall trends, product performance, customer analysis, regional comparison, and sales forecasting.

forecastModel.name: Forecast Model
forecastModel.prompt: Please design a forecasting model plan for [prediction target], available data includes [data description]. Suggest suitable model methods, required data, feature engineering, and model evaluation metrics.

dataCleaning.name: Data Cleaning
dataCleaning.prompt: Please design a data cleaning workflow for [data source], data issues include [issue description]. Include missing value handling, outlier detection, format standardization, and quality validation steps.

vizSuggestion.name: Visualization Advice
vizSuggestion.prompt: I have the following data to visualize: [data description and purpose]. Suggest the most suitable chart types, tool choices, color schemes, and layout, with explanations for each recommendation.

abExperiment.name: Experiment Design
abExperiment.prompt: Please help me design a data-driven experiment to validate [hypothesis description]. Include experiment design, control variables, sample size estimation, statistical testing methods, and result interpretation criteria.

zhEnTranslate.name: Chinese-English Translation
zhEnTranslate.prompt:
Please translate the following content into [English/Chinese], maintaining the original tone and style, ensuring the translation is natural and fluent:

[paste original text]

jaTranslate.name: Japanese Translation
jaTranslate.prompt:
Please translate the following content into [Japanese/English/Chinese], paying attention to honorific usage and Japanese expression conventions:

[paste original text]

koTranslate.name: Korean Translation
koTranslate.prompt:
Please translate the following content into [Korean/English/Chinese], paying attention to honorific levels and Korean expression conventions:

[paste original text]

multiTranslate.name: Multi-language Translation
multiTranslate.prompt:
Please translate the following content into [language list] simultaneously. Each translation should conform to local language conventions:

[paste original text]

localization.name: Localization
localization.prompt:
Please localize the following content for [target market]. Not just translation — also adjust cultural references, measurement units, date formats, and local conventions:

[paste original text]

subtitleTranslate.name: Subtitle Translation
subtitleTranslate.prompt:
Please translate the following subtitles into [target language]. Note character limits per line (recommended no more than [number] characters), maintain natural line breaks aligned with timing:

[paste subtitles]

bizTranslate.name: Business Translation
bizTranslate.prompt:
Please translate the following business document into [target language], type is [contract/report/presentation/email]. Maintain accuracy of professional terminology and formal tone:

[paste original text]

techTranslate.name: Technical Translation
techTranslate.prompt:
Please translate the following technical document into [target language], field is [IT/medical/engineering/science]. Maintain accuracy and consistency of technical terminology:

[paste original text]

literaryTranslate.name: Literary Translation
literaryTranslate.prompt:
Please translate the following literary work into [target language]. Preserve the original rhetorical devices, emotional tone, and literary style. Creative adaptation is acceptable when necessary:

[paste original text]

colloquialTranslate.name: Colloquial Translation
colloquialTranslate.prompt:
Please translate the following colloquial content into [target language] using natural everyday language rather than formal written language. Preserve the original tone and emotion:

[paste original text]

login.selectTenantHint: Please select the tenant to enter

billing.title: Subscription
billing.checkoutSuccess: Subscription successful! Your subscription has been activated.
billing.checkoutCancel: Subscription canceled. You can resubscribe anytime.

trial.title: Trial Period
trial.desc: You are currently using the free trial version
trial.quotaDesc: You are currently on a free trial. Here is your quota usage
trial.expired: After the trial period ends, please select a subscription plan to continue using the service
trial.expiredWithDate: Your trial will end on {date}. Please select a subscription plan to continue using the service.
trial.quotaFull: Limit reached, subscription required in 7 days

salesPartnerTrial.title: Partner Trial Period
salesPartnerTrial.desc: You are using a trial service provided by {partner}
salesPartnerTrial.expiredWithDate: Your trial will end on {date}. Please contact your partner to subscribe.

billing.cancelAtPeriodEnd: Will be canceled at period end
billing.noPlan: You have not subscribed to any plan yet. Please select a plan to get started
billing.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? The subscription will be canceled at the end of the current billing period.
billing.cancelSuccess: Subscription has been set to cancel at period end

aiCoins.title: vCoin
aiCoins.docGenDesc: 5 vCoin per 15 pages, minimum 5 vCoin (final cost depends on content)
aiCoins.dailyFreeTip: You have 5 free queries per day (chat & image generation), resets daily. Video and document generation are not included.

tenantSwitch.title: Select Company
tenantSwitch.selectHint: Please select the company to enter

hub.title: vAI Support Center
hub.description: vAI is V-sys's AI assistant platform, offering intelligent chat, AI image generation, AI video creation, and AI document generation to help you work efficiently.

support.title: Need More Help?
support.description: If you encounter a problem or need further assistance, please:
support.item2: Ask the AI assistant directly in vAI Chat for instant help
support.footer: We continuously update features and documentation to provide you with a better experience.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started Guide
gettingStarted.intro: Welcome to vAI! This guide will help you quickly understand vAI's core features and begin your AI work journey.
gettingStarted.whatIsVaiDesc: vAI is V-sys's AI assistant platform, integrating four core functions: intelligent chat, AI image generation, AI video creation, and AI document generation. Whether you need data analysis, creative design, or document processing, vAI provides efficient solutions.
gettingStarted.registerStep1: Go to the vAI homepage and click the Login button in the top right
gettingStarted.registerStep2: If you don't have an account, click Register to create one
gettingStarted.registerStep3: Fill in your email, password, and other basic information to complete registration
gettingStarted.registerStep4: Once logged in, you can start using all vAI features
gettingStarted.learnInterfaceDesc: After logging in, you will see the following navigation areas:
gettingStarted.navChatDesc: Have intelligent conversations with AI — ask questions, analyze data, generate content
gettingStarted.navSketchDesc: Use AI to generate images, or use the built-in drawing tools to create artwork
gettingStarted.navVideoDesc: Use AI to generate short videos, with scene editing and merging support
gettingStarted.navDocsDesc: Use AI to automatically generate Word, Excel, PPT, and PDF documents
gettingStarted.dailyFreeDesc: Each account gets 5 free queries per day for chat and image generation. Video and document generation are not included in the free quota. Beyond the free quota, AI features are billed in vCoin.
gettingStarted.nextStep1: Try asking AI a question in Chat
gettingStarted.nextStep2: Go to Image and use AI to generate an image

chat.title: vAI Chat
chat.intro: vAI Chat is the core feature for interacting with the AI assistant, supporting intelligent conversations, file analysis, data queries, and more.
chat.startStep2: Click the New Chat button above the conversation list on the left
chat.startStep3: Type your question or instruction in the input box at the bottom
chat.startStep4: Press Enter or click the send button to submit
chat.startStep5: The AI will reply within a few seconds
chat.uploadFileDesc: You can upload files for the AI to analyze:
chat.uploadStep1: Click the Attachment button (paperclip icon) next to the input box
chat.uploadStep2: Select the file you want to upload
chat.uploadStep3: Enter what you want the AI to analyze or do with the file
chat.uploadStep4: Send the message and the AI will read the file content and reply with analysis results
chat.supportedFormatsDesc: Excel (.xls, .xlsx), Word (.doc, .docx), PowerPoint (.ppt, .pptx), PDF (.pdf), Text (.txt), Images (.jpg, .jpeg, .png)
chat.manageSwitch: Switch conversations: Click any conversation in the left list
chat.manageRename: Rename a conversation: Hover over the title and click the edit icon
chat.manageDelete: Delete a conversation: Hover over the title and click the delete icon
chat.searchStep1: Click the Search icon in the top navigation bar
chat.searchStep2: Enter a keyword — the system will search all conversation titles and message content
chat.searchStep3: Click a search result to jump to the corresponding conversation and message, with matching text highlighted
chat.tip1: Be as specific as possible when asking questions, e.g., "Analyze the monthly sales trends in this Excel file"
chat.tip2: You can ask AI to generate images, videos, or documents in chat — it will automatically navigate to the corresponding feature
chat.tip3: Each simple query consumes 1 vCoin, with 5 free queries per day

sketch.title: vAI Image
sketch.intro: vAI Image provides AI image generation and built-in drawing tools, letting you easily create all kinds of visual assets.
sketch.genStep2: Enter an image description (Prompt) in the AI generation bar at the bottom
sketch.genStep3: For example: "A cat reading in a coffee shop, watercolor style"
sketch.genStep4: Click the generate button and wait for AI to create the image
sketch.genStep5: Once generated, the image will appear on the canvas
sketch.drawToolsDesc: vAI Image has a full suite of built-in drawing tools in the toolbar above the canvas:
sketch.toolSelectDesc: Select and move objects on the canvas
sketch.strokeColor: Stroke Color: Set the line or border color
sketch.fillColor: Fill Color: Set the fill color for shapes
sketch.strokeWidth: Stroke Width: Adjust the thickness of the stroke or border
sketch.canvasRatioDesc: Supports multiple canvas ratios for different use cases:
sketch.insertStep1: Click the Insert Image button in the toolbar
sketch.insertStep2: In the image picker that appears, you can:
sketch.insertFrom: Select from product images: Search for product images in your system
sketch.insertUpload: Upload an image: Drag and drop or select a local image file
sketch.insertStep3: The image will be inserted into the canvas and can be freely resized and repositioned
sketch.objectPropsDesc: When you select an object on the canvas, a properties panel will appear on the right where you can adjust:
sketch.propPosition: Position (X, Y coordinates) and size (width, height)
sketch.propLayer: Layer order (move up, move down, bring to front, send to back)
sketch.manageSave: Save sketch: Click the save button in the toolbar
sketch.manageMySketch: My Sketches: View all saved sketches in the left sidebar
sketch.manageChatGen: Chat Generated: View images generated from vAI Chat in the left sidebar
sketch.manageDelete: Delete sketch: Click the delete button in the toolbar

video.title: vAI Video
video.intro: vAI Video provides a scene-based AI video creation tool, letting you easily create short videos.
video.createStep2: Click the New Project button in the left sidebar
video.createStep5: Choose scene duration: 5, 6, 7, or 8 seconds per scene
video.sceneEditDesc: Each video project is composed of multiple scenes, each of which can be generated independently:
video.sceneRefImgDesc: (optional): You can provide a reference image for the scene and AI will use it when generating the video. Image sources can be:
video.sceneRefSketch: Sketches (from saved sketches in vAI Image)
video.scenePrompt: Enter video description: Describe the video content you want, e.g., "The product enters the frame from the left, with a soft gradient background"
video.sceneGenerate: Click the Generate button and AI will start creating the video clip
video.sceneCost: Each video generation costs 30 vCoin (per 5 seconds)
video.sceneAdd: Add scene: Click the + button at the end of the scene strip
video.sceneSwitch: Switch scenes: Click different scene thumbnails in the bottom scene strip
video.sceneDelete: Delete scene: Click the delete button in the scene editing area
video.sceneRegenerate: Regenerate: Click the regenerate button on an already-generated scene
video.extendDesc: If the generated video clip is too short, you can use the Extend Video feature:
video.extendStep1: Click the Extend Video button on a generated scene
video.extendStep2: AI will extend the existing video by approximately 7 seconds
video.mergeStep1: Once all scenes are generated, click the Merge Video button
video.mergeStep2: The system will merge all scenes into one complete video
video.mergeStep3: After merging, you can preview and download the full video

docs.title: vAI Docs
docs.intro: vAI Docs lets you automatically generate professional documents in various formats using AI.
docs.genStep3: Select the document type (Word / Excel / PPT / PDF)
docs.genStep5: Enter a description (Prompt) detailing the document content you want to generate, for example:
docs.genExampleWord: Word: "Write an annual work summary report including performance review, team growth, and future outlook"
docs.genExampleExcel: Excel: "Create a monthly financial report template with three sheets: income, expenses, and profit"
docs.genExamplePPT: PPT: "Make a product launch presentation including product introduction, key features, and pricing"
docs.genExamplePDF: PDF: "Generate an employee handbook covering company culture, policies, and benefits"
docs.genStep6: Click Generate and wait for AI to process
docs.genCost: Document generation costs 5+ vCoin (5 vCoin per 15 pages, minimum 5 vCoin)
docs.viewItem1: After generation, the document will appear in the My Documents list on the left
docs.viewItem2: Click a document to view details: title, type, status, generation date, original description, etc.
docs.viewItem3: Click the Download button to download the document to your computer
docs.fromChatDesc: You can also ask AI to generate documents directly in vAI Chat. Generated documents will appear in the Chat Generated tab on the Docs page.

vcoins.title: vCoin Virtual Currency
vcoins.intro: vCoin is vAI's virtual currency used to pay for AI feature usage.
vcoins.whatIsDesc: vCoin is vAI's consumption unit. Different AI operations consume different amounts of vCoin, allowing you to pay as you go.
vcoins.sourceDaily: Daily free quota: Each account gets 5 free queries per day
vcoins.sourceMonthly: Monthly quota: Subscription plans (vSuite / vSuite Pro) include a monthly vCoin quota that resets automatically each month
vcoins.sourcePurchase: Purchase vCoin: Buy additional vCoin top-ups; purchased vCoin never expires
vcoins.sourceGift: Gifts: vCoin may be gifted during events or promotions
vcoins.rateLeadAnalyzeDesc: AI analyzes company data and generates search keywords
vcoins.rateLeadSearchDesc: 1 vCoin per 50 search results, rounded up
vcoins.purchaseDesc: You can purchase additional vCoin on the vCoin page:
vcoins.balanceDesc: On the vCoin page, you can view:
vcoins.balanceTotal: Total available balance: Current total usable vCoin
vcoins.balanceMonthly: Monthly quota balance: Remaining monthly quota from subscription plan and reset date
vcoins.balanceDaily: Daily free quota: Remaining free queries for today
vcoins.balanceHistory: Transaction history: All vCoin usage and top-up records, with filter by type

account.title: Account & Subscription
account.intro: Manage your vAI account settings and subscription plan.
account.settingsDesc: Click the user avatar in the top right and select Account Settings to:
account.settingsItem1: Edit personal information (name, email, phone, etc.)
account.plansDesc: vAI offers the following subscription plans:
account.vsuiteFeatures: All features, unlimited records, no ads, vOffice AI smart office
account.vsuiteProFeatures: All vSuite features + enterprise support, data loss prevention, security controls
account.plansNote: The monthly vCoin quota included in subscription plans resets automatically each month.
account.manageStep1: Click the user avatar in the top right and select Subscription
account.manageStep2: View your current plan and expiration date
account.manageStep3: Upgrade or downgrade your subscription plan
account.logoutDesc: Click the user avatar in the top right and select Logout to securely log out. The system supports synchronized logout across tabs — logging out in one tab will automatically log out all other tabs.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.intro: Here are the most frequently asked questions from vAI users.
faq.a1: vAI provides 5 free queries per day. Beyond the free quota, vCoin is required. You can subscribe to a vSuite plan for a monthly vCoin quota, or purchase vCoin separately.
faq.a2: Purchased vCoin never expires and can be used indefinitely. Monthly quota from subscription plans resets each month — unused quota does not carry over. Daily free quota resets every day.
faq.q3: What file formats are supported for upload?
faq.a3desc: vAI Chat supports uploading the following file formats for analysis:
faq.q4: What if I'm not satisfied with the quality of AI-generated images/videos/documents?
faq.a4item1: Try modifying the description (Prompt) to provide more specific details and requirements
faq.a4item3: For images, you can use the built-in drawing tools to further edit
faq.a4item4: For videos, you can use the Extend Video feature to increase length
faq.a4note: Note: Regenerating will consume vCoin again.
faq.q5: How do I generate images or videos from vAI Chat?
faq.a5desc: In vAI Chat, you can directly use natural language to ask AI to generate images or videos. For example:
faq.a5ex1: "Help me generate a product promotion image"
faq.a5ex2: "Help me generate a product promotional video"
faq.a5ex3: "Help me create a company development presentation"
faq.a5note: AI will automatically invoke the corresponding feature. Generated results can be found in the Chat Generated tab on the Image/Video/Docs page.
faq.q6: Can I use vAI on multiple devices?
faq.a6: Yes. vAI is a web-based application, so you can log in from any device's browser. Your chat history, sketches, video projects, and documents are all synced and saved in the cloud.
faq.q7: What is the relationship between vAI and vWork?
faq.a7: vAI and vWork are both V-sys products. vAI is a standalone AI assistant platform, while vWork is an enterprise management system (ERP/CMS/POS). They share the same account system, and you can query and analyze vWork business data (such as orders, customers, and sales) from within vAI.
faq.q8: What should I do if I encounter other issues?
faq.a8desc: If your question is not listed above, feel free to contact us through:

notFound.title: Category Not Found
notFound.desc: Sorry, the help category you requested could not be found. Please return to the vAI Support Center to browse all categories.

support.title: Need More Help?
support.desc: If the above content didn't answer your question, feel free to
